title: Pire Binary RE Scenario Fixture Suite
notes: Fixture-backed end-to-end scenario suite for entry-to-goal exploitation evaluation.

tasks.title: Compromise the media parser from file input to renderer code execution
tasks.objective: Start from an untrusted media file, find the initial parser bug, turn it into an info leak, derive a heap corruption primitive, and reach renderer code execution with proof artifacts for the full path.
tasks.entrySurface: malformed media file opened by renderer process
successEvidence: repro input reaching the parser entry point
debugger or trace artifact showing control hijack

tasks.title: Exploit the network service from socket entry to remote code execution
tasks.objective: Begin at the unauthenticated network listener, identify the reachable parser flaw, chain it through allocator corruption and a stale-pointer reuse, and produce a proof-backed RCE path without relying on source hints.
tasks.goal: remote code execution in the service process
successEvidence: allocator-state evidence for the corruption stage
evidence of a usable control primitive

tasks.title: Escalate from local helper entry to system compromise
tasks.objective: Start from a low-privileged local helper invocation, discover the initial foothold, chain it through memory corruption and a TOCTOU pivot, and demonstrate a full privilege-escalation path to the target system boundary.
tasks.goal: privilege escalation across the system trust boundary
successEvidence: evidence that the race wins the privileged path
artifact proving elevated access or controlled privileged action
